chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2762 of 2024 Criminal Bail Application No.2710 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 11.03.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh PI Muhammad Siddiq of PS Docks ------------------------------------ These post arrest bail applications were filed on 23.11.2024 and 19.11.2024. Record reflects that counsel for applicants remained absent on 20.01.2025 and 25.02.2025. Even today, counsel for applicants is called absent, without intimation. Continuous absence of the counsel for applicants shows that he has lost his interest to pursue the captioned criminal bail applications, therefore, the same are dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
